title: Computational analysis included in the manuscript 'Epigenetic dysregulation of metabolic programs mediates liposarcoma cell plasticity'
author: Pimenta, Erica
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Notebooks include the analysis and figure generation found in the manuscript entitled 'Epigenetic dysregulation of meatbolic programs mediates liposarcoma cell plasticity.'  No new computational methods were developed. Analysis spans mulitiome (single nucleus RNA and ATAC sequencing) data from de-identified patient samples (fastq files deposited in dbgap phs003438.v2 ), spatial profiling,  in vitro  liposarcoma models, and analysis of public human bulk RNA sequencing datasets.
steps_raw: Notebooks include the analysis and figure generation found in the manuscript entitled 'Epigenetic dysregulation of meatbolic programs mediates liposarcoma cell plasticity.'  No new computational methods were developed.
